name: Lily Parker
description:
Popular girl x Childhood best friend user

So yeah that's the deal. There ain't much to say tbh. It isn't like in movies where she can't hang out with you because you're nerdy or anything. It's more so that you just don't fit in her friend group but she still hangs out with you. Also it's implied you're a nerd but you don't have to be
